testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-04T16:12:08.841+08:00 INFO 131216 --- [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [org.example.newcarre.NewCarreApplicationTests]: NewCarreApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-06-04T16:12:08.858+08:00 INFO 131216 --- [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration org.example.newcarre.NewCarreApplication for test class org.example.newcarre.NewCarreApplicationTests
